    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Order
    OrderDAO.getOrder(int id)
    Retrieves an order by its unique order number.
    Order
    OrderDAO.getOrderByConfirmationCode(int code)
    Fetches an APPROVED order by confirmation code.
    Order
    OrderDAO.getOrderByConfirmationCodeApproved(int code, Integer customerId)
    Checks if there is an approved order ready for seating (within 15 minutes).
    Order
    OrderDAO.getOrderByConfirmationCodePending(int confirmationCode)
    Fetches a PENDING order by confirmation code.
    Order
    OrderDAO.getOrderByConfirmationCodeSeated(int code, Integer customerId)
    Checks if there is a SEATED order for a customer or code.
    Order
    OrderDAO.getOrderByConfirmationCodeWithStatusNull(int code)
    Fetches an order by confirmation code that is either PENDING or APPROVED.
    Order
    OrderDAO.getOrderByContact(String contactDetail)
    Retrieves an order by customer contact details (email or phone).
    Order
    OrderDAO.getOrderInTimeWindow(int customerId, Date checkDate)
    Checks if a customer already has an approved order within a 2-hour window of the checkDate.
    private Order
    OrderDAO.mapResultSetToOrder(ResultSet rs)
    Helper method to map a ResultSet row to an Order object.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    OrderDAO.getAllOrders()
    Retrieves all orders from the database, joined with customer details.
    List<Order>
    OrderDAO.getAllOrdersApproved(int subscriberCode)
    Retrieves all APPROVED orders for a specific subscriber code.
    List<Order>
    OrderDAO.getApprovedOrdersByGuestCount(int guests)
    Retrieves APPROVED orders for a specific number of guests.
    List<Order>
    OrderDAO.getFinishedOrdersByMonth(int month, int year)
    Retrieves finished orders (PAID or CANCELLED) for a specific month/year.
    List<Order>
    OrderDAO.getOrdersByCustomerId(int customerId)
    Retrieves all orders for a specific customer ID.
    List<Order>
    OrderDAO.getOrdersByStatus(Order.OrderStatus status)
    Retrieves all orders matching a specific status.
    List<Order>
    OrderDAO.getOrdersForReminder(int minutesAhead)
    Retrieves orders that are due for a reminder.
